zh.Wortley, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾沃特利
zh.Wortley, Yorkshire, England, United King: 英國英格蘭越可爾沃特利
zh.St. Michael's Temple, Thornhill, Yorkshi: 英國英格蘭越可爾恩爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Tunstall於大約1413年出生在英國藍卡爾時，她的父親Sir William Tunstall VI33歲，母親Lady Anne Parr21歲。她於大約1431年與Nicholas Wortley II在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1492年3月21日在英國越可爾恩爾享年80歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾恩爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Tunstall于大约1413年出生在英国藍卡爾时，她的父亲Sir William Tunstall VI33岁，母亲Lady Anne Parr21岁。她于大约1431年与Nicholas Wortley II在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1492年3月21日在英国越可爾恩爾享年80岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾恩爾。

nameMeanings.name: Tunstall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Lancashire): habitational name from any of various places called with Old English tūn-stall ‘site of a farm, farmstead’, notably Tunstall (Lancashire) and one or more of many Staffordshire places (Tunstall near Stoke on Trent, Tunstall near Adbaston, and four places called Dunstall), but also Tunstall Farm in Mountfield (Sussex) and possibly also Tunstall (Durham, Kent, Norfolk, Shropshire, Suffolk, east and North Yorkshire), and Dunstall (Lincolnshire).

variants.name: Tunstill
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of   Tunstall  .

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Tunstall was born about 1413, in Lancashire, England, her father, Sir William Tunstall VI, was 33 and her mother, Lady Anne Parr, was 21. She married Nicholas Wortley II about 1431, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 21 March 1492, in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 80, and was buried in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Tunstall est née environ 1413, à Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Tunstall VI, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Lady Anne Parr, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Nicholas Wortley II environ 1431, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 21 mars 1492, à Thornhill, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterrée à Thornhill, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Tunstall um 1413 in Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Tunstall VI 33 und ihre Mutter Lady Anne Parr 21. Sie hat um 1431 in Yorkshire, England Nicholas Wortley II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 21. März 1492 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Tunstall è nata il circa 1413 nel Lancashire, England, sua padre, Sir William Tunstall VI, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Lady Anne Parr, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Nicholas Wortley II circa 1431, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 21 marzo 1492, nel Thornhill, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolta a Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Tunstallが約1413年にイギリスランカシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir William Tunstall VIは33歳，母Lady Anne Parrは21歳であった。約1431年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでNicholas Wortley IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1492年3月21日にイギリスヨークシュアイアソルンヒルで80歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアソルンヒルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Tunstall(이)가 대략 1413년 영국 랭카실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Tunstall VI(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Anne Parr(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1431년 영국 요르크실르에서 Nicholas Wortley II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1492년 3월 21일 영국 요르크실르 토른힐에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 토른힐에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Tunstall nasceu aproximadamente 1413, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Tunstall VI, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Lady Anne Parr, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Nicholas Wortley II aproximadamente 1431, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 21 de março de 1492, em Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 80 anos, e foi sepultada em Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Tunstall родилась около 1413 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Tunstall VI было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Anne Parr, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas Wortley II около 1431 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 21 марта 1492 г. в местности таурнилл, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 80 лет и была похоронена в местности таурнилл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Tunstall nació aproximadamente 1413, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Tunstall VI, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Lady Anne Parr, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Nicholas Wortley II aproximadamente 1431, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 21 de marzo de 1492, en Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultada en Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
